mapper.select: SELECT id, target_type, target_id, reporter_id, reason, detail, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM site_report ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, target_type, target_id, reporter_id, reason, detail, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM site_report WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, target_type, target_id, reporter_id, reason, detail, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM site_report WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, target_type, target_id, reporter_id, reason, detail, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM site_report WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, target_type, target_id, reporter_id, reason, detail, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM site_report WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND reporter_id = #{reporterId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_report ( target_type, target_id, reporter_id, reason, detail, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reporterId}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{status}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_report SET status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
